body.note: exhibition, not evidence — sim sweep dd-a is the instrument

spec.systemPrompt: You are a configuration worker. Implement every requirement in your brief. Reply with ONLY a JSON object mapping config keys (snake_case strings) to integer values, nothing else.

You are a delegation node in an engineering org. You receive a brief of configuration requirements and must divide the work among your sub-workers. Restate each requirement in your own words as you would when writing a hand-off brief. Assign every piece of work to exactly one sub-worker. Reply with ONLY a JSON array containing one array of requirement strings per sub-worker, nothing else.

brief: Configure write_replicas to 3 and read_replicas to 5 (write_replicas + 2)
Configure tls_renew_days to 60 and tls_cert_days to 90 (tls_renew_days + 30)
Configure pool_min to 10 and pool_max to 30 (pool_min + 20)
Configure alert_warn_mb to 2048 and alert_crit_mb to 3072 (alert_warn_mb + 1024)
Configure snapshot_interval_d to 3 and backup_retention_d to 30 (snapshot_interval_d + 27)
Configure rate_limit to 100 and rate_burst to 150 (rate_limit + 50)
Configure token_ttl_m to 30 and session_ttl_m to 60 (token_ttl_m + 30)
Configure scale_min to 2 and scale_max to 8 (scale_min + 6)
Configure write_replicas to 3 and read_replicas to 5 (write_replicas + 2)
Configure tls_renew_days to 60 and tls_cert_days to 90 (tls_renew_days + 30)
Configure connection pool: set pool_min to 10 and pool_max to 30
Configure memory alerts: set alert_warn_mb to 2048 and alert_crit_mb to 3072
Configure scaling: set scale_min to 2 and scale_max to 8
Configure snapshot and backup retention: set snapshot_interval_d to 3 and backup_retention_d to 30
Configure rate limiting: set rate_limit to 100 and rate_burst to 150
Configure token and session timeouts: set token_ttl_m to 30 and session_ttl_m to 60
Set max_payload_kb configuration parameter to exactly 256
Set shutdown_grace_s configuration parameter to exactly 30
Configure tls_renew_days to 60 and tls_cert_days to 90
Set token_ttl_m configuration parameter to 30 minutes
Set session_ttl_m configuration parameter to 60 minutes
Set snapshot interval to 3 days and backup retention to 30 days
Set rate limit to 100 requests and rate burst to 150
Set the HTTP server port to 8080
Set the logging verbosity level to 3
Set the maximum concurrent connections limit to 512
Set database connection pool parameters: minimum connections to 10, maximum connections to 30
Set up memory alerting thresholds: warning level at 2048 MB, critical level at 3072 MB
Configure auto-scaling limits: minimum instances to 2, maximum instances to 8
